checks.description: data_out must remain low for edge stimulus patterns that do not constitute a valid pulse.
checks.pass_condition: During edge case execution, data_out never transitions to 1 unless a valid 0‑1‑0 three‑cycle pulse is observed.
checks.trigger_condition: When edge case stimuli are applied.

checks.description: data_out should assert high after a valid pulse and return low thereafter, observed within a bounded window.
checks.pass_condition: Following the basic pulse stimulus, data_out becomes 1 at some cycle within 5 cycles and later returns to 0, without requiring exact-cycle timing.
checks.trigger_condition: When the basic pulse stimulus is applied.
